privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated FHIR JSON payloads in an Oracle database. The export script verifies the use of specific Oracle features including JSON_TABLE, LAST_VALUE IGNORE NULLS, MATCH_RECOGNIZE, and Materialized Views. The results are correctly written to /tmp/icu_telemetry_result.json.
